title: Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 – The Pusad Urban Co-operative Bank Ltd., Pusad, Maharashtra – Extension of Period
description: The Reserve Bank of India had issued Directions under Section 35A read with Section 56 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 to The Pusad Urban Co-operative Bank Ltd., Pusad, Dist. Yavatmal, Maharashtra, vide Directive No. NGP.DOS.SSM3.No.S611/5-04-166/2025-2026 dated November 06, 2025, for a period of six months up to the close of business on May 07, 2026. 2.
